basic_details.short_information: The Maharishi Valmiki Hospital (MVH) has officially announced the Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website. Candidates with an MBBS degree from a recognized university, who have completed their internship and are not more than 30 years of age, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC; further relaxation to 40 years under provisions of circular dated 10/06/2011.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from recognized university with completed internship
qualification.details: MBBS from a recognized university. Must have completed one year internship not before 2 years as on date of interview. Enrolled with Delhi Medical Council. The candidate must not have completed 01 years Junior Residency in any Govt. hospital in India.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.maharishi_valmiki_hospital: MBBS from recognized university with completed internship

content_sections.heading: MVH Junior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MVH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS from a recognized university. Must have completed one year internship not before 2 years as on date of interview. Enrolled with Delhi Medical Council. The candidate must not have completed 01 years Junior Residency in any Govt. hospital in India.

content_sections.heading: MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC; further relaxation to 40 years under provisions of circular dated 10/06/2011.

content_sections.heading: MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MVH Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MVH Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital is scheduled for 28 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university and have completed a one-year internship. They should also be enrolled with the Delhi Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,100 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the MVH Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts. Candidates from all categories are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, Delhi Medical Council registration, and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Junior Resident (MBBS) role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have completed one year of internship and should not have completed one year of Junior Residency in any government hospital in India.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Maharishi Valmiki Hospital located?
faq.answer: Maharishi Valmiki Hospital is located in Delhi. The specific address and venue for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.
